candidates.why: Explicit top-line revenue figure; large positive amounts consistent with total sales. The alternative candidate is explicitly labeled non-revenue and should not be used as revenue.
Explicitly labeled non-revenue; therefore inappropriate as REVT and kept only as a lower-priority fallback by listing but will not be used given the better match above.

variables.notes: Clear, standard total revenue line; other candidate is non-revenue by label.

candidates.why: Direct production/input cost; magnitude is large and consistent with cost of sales. Most semantically aligned with COGS among candidates.
Also represents material input purchases, but label is slightly less specific than 'Raw material and energy expense' for ongoing production costs.

candidates.row_label: Raw material and energy expense - others
candidates.why: Appears to be a subcomponent/other bucket of raw material and energy costs; less clear as primary COGS line.

candidates.row_label: Unrealized derivative effects on power and raw material contracts
candidates.why: Derivative valuation effects, not core COGS; should not be used as main COGS.
Inventory balance, not a period expense; not appropriate for COGS.

variables.notes: Uses main raw material and energy expense line as COGS; other candidates are either components, less direct, or not period expenses.

candidates.why: Represents other operating income; not clearly SG&A and mixes with income side, but candidate list is restricted to these lines.
Net bucket of other operating income and expenses; closest available proxy for operating overhead/SG&A within the allowed candidates.
Same concept as prior line, with alternate capitalization; likely covers additional years. Appropriate to include to capture SG&A-like overhead across history.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A line is offered in candidates; chosen lines are mixed other operating income/expense buckets and may not cleanly represent SG&A. Review recommended.

candidates.why: Explicit R&D expense line with non-zero values; best representation of period R&D expense.
Capitalized R&D, not current expense; should not be primary XRD but related.
Duplicate/alternative wording of R&D; appears to have no recent values in preview but may represent historical periods.
Balance sheet development assets; not a period R&D expense.
Appears to be a total/cumulative measure of R&D expenditure; less appropriate than the specific current-period expense line.

variables.notes: Uses explicit current-period R&D expense line; capitalized and total measures are not selected.

candidates.why: Broad interest and finance expense line; includes more than pure interest but is a valid fallback if more specific interest expense lines are unavailable in some years.

candidates.row_label: Net income (loss) attributable to non-controlling interests
candidates.why: Represents profit allocation, not interest; should not be used for XINT.
Same as non-controlling interests; not interest expense.
Interest income, opposite sign of interest expense; not appropriate for XINT which targets expense.
Generic label but appears with missing values in preview; there are more specific, populated labels for net interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Component of interest expense related to lease liabilities; good secondary candidate when net interest expense is missing.
Explicit non-lease interest expense component; strong candidate for interest expense when present.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Most precise measure of net interest expense (excluding capitalized interest); ideal primary line for XINT.
Interest capitalized to assets, not expensed; not appropriate for XINT itself.
Interest component of pension liability; part of finance costs but narrower than total interest expense; can be a later fallback if others missing.
Same concept as Capitalized Interest; not an expense line.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease-related interest; similar role to main lease interest line.

candidates.row_label: Bank loans and other interest-bearing short-term debt
candidates.why: Balance sheet debt, not interest expense.
Balance sheet debt, not interest expense.
Equity component, not interest.
Equity component, not interest.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Priority list: primary is net interest expense excluding capitalized interest, then non-lease and lease components, then broader finance expense as a fallback.

candidates.row_label: Share of the profit (loss) in equity acc
candidates.why: Income from equity-accounted investments; not an equity stock measure.

candidates.row_label: Share of the profit (loss) in equity accounted investments
candidates.why: Same as above; not total equity.

candidates.row_label: OCI - Share of remeasurement postemployement benefits of equity accounted investments, net of tax
candidates.why: OCI component, not total equity.

candidates.row_label: OCI - Share of items that will be reclassified to income statement of equity accounted investments, net of tax
candidates.why: OCI component, not total equity.
Equity income, not stock of equity.
Equity income, not total equity.

candidates.row_label: Impairment charges (PP&E and equity accounted invest)
candidates.why: Impairment expense, not equity.

candidates.row_label: Investments accounted for using the equity method
candidates.why: Non-current asset (investments), not equity capital.
Component of equity; not total equity.
Equity attributable to parent shareholders; strong candidate but excludes non-controlling interests. Still a good proxy for book equity of the firm’s shareholders.
Explicit total equity including non-controlling interests; best match for overall book equity (BE).

variables.notes: Uses explicit Total equity line from balance sheet as book equity.

candidates.row_label: Net income (loss) attributable to non-controlling interests
candidates.why: Income statement allocation of earnings to non-controlling interests; not the balance sheet stock but confirms presence of minority interests.
Income statement minority interest amount; similar to prior line.
Balance sheet carrying amount of non-controlling interests; best representation of minority interest (MIB).
Alternate label for balance sheet minority interest; same concept as non-controlling interests and may cover different years.

candidates.row_label: Total comprehensive income attributable to non-controlling interests
candidates.why: Flow of comprehensive income, not stock; not primary MIB but related.

variables.notes: Primary is balance sheet non-controlling interests, with Minority Interest as alternate label to cover other periods.
